title: Testing and Debugging Mobile Apps
text: Testing and Debugging Mobile Apps You can test and debug the dynamic server pages (DSPs) that make up the embedded web application using the Uniface Debugger and browser-based debugging tools. However, to test and debug features that access mobile device functionality you should install the app on emulators or simulators, and at least some actual devices. Testing and Debugging DSPs Uniface provides the following options for testing DSPs: Test the application first as a responsive web application. For more information, see Debugging in a Web Environment . Using the browser of a mobile device, you can validate the DSPs on a mobile device. However it is not possible to test device-based functionality in this way. For more information, see Testing DSPs on Mobile Devices . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
